title: lepidium montanum subsp. tenellum
intro: Lepidium montanum subsp. tenellum, also known as Mountain Pepper Grass or small pepperwort, is a subspecies of the mountain pepper plant, a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium montanum subsp. tenellum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce joint pain, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine and as a culinary ingredient.
